'''Zrim''' was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] who was an acolyte of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], Zrim was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] to use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Zrim was selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] and took up the rank of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="YDR" />

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Padawan Zrim was stationed at the Temple and participated in the annual [[Jedi Temple Apprentice Tournament|Apprentice Tournament]] overseen by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ilena Xan]]. During the competition, Zrim faced off against Padawan [[Flerp]].<ref name="YDR" />

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' Zrim's name is mistakenly combined with Padawan [[Flerp]]. In the novel, ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', the names of the pairs of Padawans that are about to duel each other are being called by Master [[Ilena Xan]]. Each pair is listed, surname only; i.e. "Flerp, Zrim." and "Page, Glip." Later Xan calls out, "Chizzik, Enwandung-Esterhazy," thus providing the reader with concrete evidence that only surnames were being used.
